name: @harness/orchestrator
description: ISSUE-061 (C8 ORC/REG) — the data-driven agent layer's spine: the `agents` registry (version-discipline, empty-description reject, PERM-agents authority split OD-080, enabled-gated discovery, idempotent canonical-roster seed incl. the positive Comms/Finance seed check REG.006.3) plus the single orchestrator running the seven-step routing engine (classify → registry-read → score → build-plan → confidence-check → version+log → outcome-track), with the crash-window re-route guard (ORC.001.3) and the secondary-sink outcome-write guarantee (ORC.007.2). Port + in-memory fake reference model; supabase-store.ts is the live pg adapter authored to the baseline DDL (agents / execution_plans / prompt_layers / event_log / task_queue) — NOT run live. Reads @harness/prompt-store (Layer-1 resolution) and @harness/task-queue (dequeue + awaiting-clarification status). Routing-accuracy/confidence/outcome claims rest on AF-121/122/126 (EVAL, owed to live).
